# 360 Hotelier

> Hospitality consulting for hotels in Cyprus: revenue management, online sales and distribution, digital marketing, and tour-operator contracting. The public site explains services, showcases portfolio work, and offers contact options.

The site is a WordPress marketing site (360 Hotelier theme). Default language is English at the site root; Greek content uses an `/el/` path prefix on the same page slugs.

- [Sitemap](https://360hotelier.com/sitemap.xml): Machine-readable list of main URLs with `hreflang` alternates for English and Greek.

## Main pages

- [Home](https://360hotelier.com/): Positioning, results, services overview, and primary calls to action.
- [About](https://360hotelier.com/about/): Company story and positioning.
- [Services](https://360hotelier.com/services/): Overview of consulting offerings.
- [Portfolio](https://360hotelier.com/portfolio/): Case-style work and gallery content.
- [Contact](https://360hotelier.com/contact/): Inquiry and contact details.
- [Founder](https://360hotelier.com/founder/): Leadership profile page.

## Service detail pages

- [Revenue management](https://360hotelier.com/services/revenue-management/): Yield and revenue strategy for hotels.
- [Online sales & distribution](https://360hotelier.com/services/online-sales-distribution/): OTAs, direct channels, and distribution mix.
- [Digital marketing](https://360hotelier.com/services/digital-marketing/): Digital acquisition and brand visibility.
- [Tour operator contracting](https://360hotelier.com/services/tour-operator-contracting/): B2B contracting and partnerships.

## Greek (Ελληνικά)

Same structure under the `el` prefix, for example [Greek home](https://360hotelier.com/el/) and [Greek services](https://360hotelier.com/el/services/).

## Optional

- [Privacy policy](https://360hotelier.com/privacy-policy/)
- [Cookie policy](https://360hotelier.com/cookie-policy/)
- [Terms & conditions](https://360hotelier.com/terms/)
- [Theme developer](https://balian.cy/): Balian Web Development Co. (site implementation, not hotel operations).
